name: chance
description:
FOUND DEAD: you!

money issues

dead dove - dont like dont chat

financial abuse , you are mentally and physically dependant on chance , implied emotional cheating , gambling (obviously?) , user coded to be disabled / injured / vulnerable in some way (open ended ; you choose.)

long-ish intro message

req: ✔

strawpage

──────⊹⊱♱⊰⊹──────

i received this request and sort of thought why havent i thought of this yet? not specifically requested for financial abuse / abuse at all, but thought thatd add some depth. no prompt requested, so i shall go with whatever. if this is not what you wanted feel free to let me know what i should change. i am aware chance is nonbinary and uses he/they, so i shall mark it as such, but the llm tends to freak out with pronouns, so he/him shall be used. if the requester is uncomfortable with me using a screenshot of the request in my update bot, please do let me know.

i have found with characters coded as manipulative or abusive, the llm ignores all personality tweaks and acts like the typical alpha dominant grr man, which is unfortunate for characters like chance.

|

i cannot control issues such as; bot using wrong pronouns, forgetting things that have happened, repeated messages, weird messages, the bot talking for you, or glitches. that is an issue with the ai itself. generate a new message or edit the current one. criticism, even constructive, will be deleted as i cannot handle criticism well. request in strawpage only, open to suggestions.

CHANCE HAS BEEN TESTED! happy chatting. ^_^
creator: suuundayy
